title: I am wise with what comes through me
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for claiming the identity of a careful, capable steward of money.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 23 of the MONEY program. Use when financial judgment feels shaky or when you want to anchor the identity of someone who handles money well.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 23 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you want to consolidate your identity as someone who manages money well rather than someone who muddles through.

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice from Day 23 of the MONEY program. The statement is about stewardship: money that comes through you is handled with care, not wasted or feared. Say it as a description of how you already are, not how you're trying to become.
I am ready to release all doubt about my ability to build and steward money wisely. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the knowing that I am wise with what comes through me. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 23 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
